title: Search for 4
narration: We search in the sorted array, but this time the target might be missing.
callout: The search starts the same way as exact binary search.

title: Too small, move right
narration: The middle value is 3. It is too small for 4, so the insertion spot must be to the right.

title: Loop stops at the insertion spot
narration: The next middle is 5, which is too big. When the loop stops, left lands at index 2, which is where 4 should go.
decision: Return left when the target is missing.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why does left end at the correct insertion spot?
